title: cuphea pertenuis
intro: Cuphea pertenuis, also known as the firecracker plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lythraceae. The plant is known for its vibrant red and yellow flowers, which are rich in antioxidants and have been used for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The medicinal properties of Cuphea pertenuis have been associated with various health benefits, such as reduced inflammation, improved cardiovascular health, and enhanced immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
